release_notes:
### ShibaClaw v0.3.2 🐾

- **Fix**: Bundled native Windows runtime DLLs (pywebview, pythonnet, clr_loader) in GitHub Actions builds. Packaging now includes all required .NET assemblies and WebView2 loaders.
- **Improvement**: Added a `--verify-desktop` smoke test to the CI pipeline to ensure native dependencies are correctly bundled before release.
upgrade_notes: Update to v0.3.2. Fixes the Windows executable startup crash in GitHub-distributed releases.

changes.note: Added explicit collection of webview, clr_loader, and pythonnet data/binaries.
Added --verify-desktop flag for CI dependency validation.
Improved smoke test to verify desktop dependencies.
